# Prospera Mind

A premium digital wellness product offering a bundle of 10 guided wealth meditation videos designed to rewire the subconscious mind for financial abundance. The brand exudes a dark, luxurious aesthetic — deep navy or black with gold accents — and positions itself at the intersection of neuroscience, sound frequency, and prosperity mindset coaching. The product is structured as a complete audio-visual journey, with each meditation targeting a specific psychological or energetic block to wealth. The tone is empowering, sophisticated, and results-driven, appealing to those who take their personal growth and financial transformation seriously.

Source: https://example.com

---

##

## Rewire Your Mindfor Wealth -10 Guided Meditations



### A complete audio-visual journey to shift your money mindset, attract abundance, and unlock financial flow.



Get Instant Access — $19

10 guided video meditations  ·  Instant access  ·  Daily wealth reset



























The Complete Bundle


## What's Inside



10 powerful meditations, each targeting a different block to wealth:










01


### Abundance Activation


Open your system to receiving more.



8 min







02


### Money Mindset Reset


Replace inherited money stories with guided meditation for money mindset.



10 min







03


### Releasing Scarcity


Let go of fear-based financial patterns.



12 min







04


### Attracting Opportunities


Train attention toward aligned possibilities for manifesting your ideal path.



9 min









05


### Wealth Identity Embodiment


Become the version of you who holds more.



14 min







06


### Financial Flow Expansion


Relax resistance around earning and receiving.



11 min







07


### Self-Worth & Income


Strengthen the link between value and visibility.



10 min








08


### Receiving Without Guilt


Dissolve internal limits around having more.



13 min







09


### Prosperity Frequency Alignment


Use sound and focus to reinforce abundance meditation.



15 min







10


### Future Wealth Visualization


Mentally rehearse your next financial reality.



16 min









Total runtime: approx. 118 minutes of guided audio-visual transformation





















The Science Behind the Practice


## Why It Works



Designed to move beyond motivation and into repetition-driven transformation.













### Neural Rewiring


Daily practice rewires neural pathways around money and possibility, building new mental architecture for abundance through consistent repetition.










### Frequency Anchoring


Visualization combined with precision sound frequencies helps anchor new subconscious patterns — making abundance meditation videos a direct channel to lasting change.










### Prosperity Mindset


Repeated exposure builds a prosperity mindset over time, so wealth feels safer to create and hold — transforming your guided meditation for money mindset into a lived reality.



















The Meditation Bundle


## A Complete Audio-Visual Journey



Every meditation is designed as part of one strategic progression: identify the block, interrupt the pattern, and rehearse a new wealth reality.








### See it clearly


Guided visualization turns abstract desire into a felt internal blueprint — the foundation of attracting opportunities.










### Hear it deeply


Sound-led immersion with guided meditation for money mindset supports focus, calm, and powerful repetition.










### Practice it consistently


A structured sequence makes mindset work easier to sustain — one session at a time, one shift at a time.
























Instant access




10-session bundle

















## Built for Serious Practice



Guided abundance meditation videos engineered around daily consistency — not motivation spikes.








10

Guided video meditations, each targeting a distinct psychological block to financial abundance







Daily

Short sessions designed for consistency — a repeatable practice that fits into any schedule







3-in-1

Mindset coaching, guided visualization, and sound frequency — unified in every session







Focused

Structured to target specific wealth blocks — from scarcity thinking to attracting opportunities









A focused bundle for people who want a calm, repeatable abundance practice they can actually maintain.


















## Before You Begin



Everything you need to know before starting your wealth meditation practice.








Q


### Who is this for?


People actively working on their money mindset, abundance patterns, and financial self-concept — those ready to move beyond surface-level motivation and into real subconscious rewiring.







Q


### How do I use the bundle?


Move through the 10 sessions in sequence for the full journey, or return to the meditations that match your current block. The structure supports both linear progress and targeted repetition.







Q


### How long are the meditations?


Short, focused sessions designed to fit into a realistic daily or weekly practice. You don't need an hour — you need consistency. Each session is intentionally compact without sacrificing depth.







Q


### Do I need experience with meditation?


No. The guidance is designed to be fully accessible to beginners while still feeling premium and intentional. If you can breathe and listen, you can benefit from this guided meditation for money mindset transformation.







Q


### What makes this different?


It combines guided wealth meditation, structured repetition, visualization, and sound-based immersion into one cohesive journey — not a playlist of generic audio, but a deliberate sequence built to shift your financial self-concept at the subconscious level.






































## Start Your Wealth MeditationPractice Today





Your next money story is shaped by what you rehearse consistently.

—

## About This Program


Prospera Mind uses proven manifestation techniques to help you attract and land your ideal job. Our system checks your mindset alignment and readiness to ensure you're truly prepared to receive the career opportunities you deserve. How does this work?






Program: Job Manifestation Accelerator


Method: Prospera Mind Framework v3.0


Access: prosperamind.com/manifest-your-job






✦

Mindset verified! You're ready to manifest your dream job.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy


















The Complete Bundle


## What's Inside



10 powerful meditations, each targeting a different block to wealth:







# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/17/2026



Prospera Mind ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Prospera Mind

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement


















The Complete Bundle


## What's Inside



10 powerful meditations, each targeting a different block to wealth:







# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 17, 2026



Prospera Mind is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Prospera Mind

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions


















The Complete Bundle


## What's Inside



10 powerful meditations, each targeting a different block to wealth:







# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 17, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Prospera Mind

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Wellness & Personal Development provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Prospera Mind provides Wellness & Personal Development through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Prospera Mind. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Prospera Mind

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
